Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics
Graphics primitives for FlixelGDX.

This package contains the lightweight wrappers and helpers used for rendering sprites and working with textures in a Flixel style.

Key types:

  • FlixelGraphic - Pooled wrapper around a texture asset key with reference counting and persistence policy.
  • FlixelFrame - Frame metadata wrapper around a TextureRegion, used for sprite sheets and atlas like behavior.
  • FlixelGraphicSource - Source object that provides consistent loading and wrapper access for one graphic key.

Textures are loaded through Flixel.assets and should be preloaded in a loading state to avoid blocking the main thread, which is what the game loop runs on.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx
    The core package of the FlixelGDX framework.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    FlixelFrame
    HaxeFlixel-like frame wrapper around a libGDX TextureRegion.
    FlixelGraphic
    Graphic container and wrapper around a libGDX Texture, implementing FlixelAsset<Texture> via FlixelTypedAsset.
    FlixelGraphicSource
    Cached graphic "source" (asset) that can provide a pooled FlixelGraphic wrapper.
    FlixelGraphicWrapperFactory
    Pooled FlixelGraphic factory for FlixelAssetManager.obtainWrapper(String, Class).
